Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x03DA "FRANTICFREDDIEII-0700-03DA" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $0700 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Frantic Freddie II (2019).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0700 to set the serial shift register ($DC0C) to $20 to allow the game to run correctly. Also NOP'd out the calls to the kernal load routine at $98BE and save routine at $5FDD to remove disk access.
